linkedin.title: AI GTM Engineer | Clay, Smartlead, n8n | Outbound Systems
linkedin.headline: AI GTM Engineer | Built 9 GTM repos | $550K+ revenue | Clay + Smartlead + n8n | Signal to pipeline with QA gates
linkedin.about:
I build outbound systems end to end: capture buying signals, enrich in Clay, write and test copy, gate lists before send, route through n8n to Smartlead and HeyReach, and audit deliverability weekly.

Recent work:
- 9 open-source repos on GitHub (list scoring, Clay formulas, cadences, personalizer)
- Live portfolio: rasulshaikh.github.io/gtm-portfolio
- RemoteState: 250+ domains, $180K ARR in 6 months, deploy time 2 weeks to 3 days
- Omnibound: 60-column Clay workflow, 1.5%+ reply rate

Stack: Clay, Smartlead, HeyReach, HubSpot, Apollo, n8n, Python, Claude API, Playwright.

Open to GTM Engineer, RevOps, and Founder's Office roles. Remote worldwide.

indeed.summary: AI GTM Engineer with 3+ years building outbound systems for B2B SaaS. Expert in Clay, Smartlead, n8n, and HubSpot. Generated $550K+ revenue and $3.5M+ pipeline. Built 9 production GTM tools on GitHub. 250+ domain deliverability at 95%+. Available remote immediately.

I ship signal-to-pipeline systems: Clay tables, n8n orchestration, Smartlead/HeyReach sends, and gates so bad lists never go out. $550K+ revenue, $3.5M+ pipeline, 9 GitHub repos, live portfolio with case studies. Looking for GTM Engineer or technical growth roles at B2B startups.
